title: BanzaFederationObligation
description: Obligation created by the originating operator when a cross-operator payment is accepted. Input to the cross-operator netting and settlement process.

schema_version.description: Obligation schema version. Must be '1' for this obligation format.

obligation_id.description: Globally unique obligation identifier. Assigned by Operator A.

from_operator_id.description: operator_id of the operator that owes the money (routing requestor).

to_operator_id.description: operator_id of the operator that is owed the money (routing acceptor).

minor.description: Amount in minor units. MUST equal the amount in the routing request. INV-FED-005.

routing_request_id.description: The routing request that generated this obligation. UNIQUE — one obligation per routing request. INV-FED-002.

interop_transfer_id.description: Operator B's transfer ID from the RoutingResponse. Corroborates the obligation.

trace_id.description: Causal trace identifier. MUST match the originating payment trace_id. INV-FED-001.

recorded_at.description: UTC timestamp when Operator A recorded this obligation.

settlement_state.description: Current state in the obligation lifecycle. Transitions: pending → in_netting → settled only.

netting_period.description: Netting cycle identifier. Set when settlement_state transitions to 'in_netting'. e.g. '2026-06-01'.

settled_at.description: UTC timestamp of settlement. Present only when settlement_state = 'settled'.

settlement_batch_id.description: Settlement batch identifier. Present only when settlement_state = 'settled'.

obligor_signature.description: ed25519 signature by Operator A over canonical JSON of all fields except obligor_signature. Prevents amount disputes at netting time.
